# SaaS LTD Deals

> SaaS LTD Deals is a programmatic directory of SaaS lifetime deals — one-time purchase software tools aggregated from AppSumo, DealFuel, DealMirror, and Dealify. Updated nightly.

## What This Site Contains
- 1,878+ SaaS product listings with real-time pricing
- Lifetime deal pricing from 4 major platforms
- Category pages for 95 software categories
- Product comparison pages
- Price history tracking

## How To Use This Data
- Each product page includes: current price, original price, discount %, rating, review count, affiliate purchase link
- Products marked "Deal Expired" are no longer available at listed price
- Prices updated nightly via automated scraping
